title: PRD: Custom dashboard widgets
text:
# PRD — Custom dashboard widgets
Product area: Dashboards
Status: In Review
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request custom dashboard widgets. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Dashboards area.

## Proposed solution
Implement custom dashboard widgets with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Dashboards-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Committed for next quarter.
